title: pelargonium candidum
intro: Pelargonium candidum, also known as Rose Geranium or White Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium candidum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium candidum include teas, tinctures, essential oils, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
